# Sponsio

> Runtime contract enforcement for LLM agent systems. Users write
> safety rules in natural language; Sponsio compiles them to Linear
> Temporal Logic (LTL) and enforces them at runtime on a grounded
> event trace. Deterministic rules block unsafe actions with **zero
> LLM calls** (<1 ms per check); stochastic rules use an LLM-as-judge
> pipeline for quality properties (tone, PII, format). Works with
> LangGraph, MCP, OpenAI SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, Vercel AI
> SDK, and the Claude Agent SDK. Zero core dependencies, Apache 2.0.

## Quick usage

```bash
pip install sponsio
```

```python
import sponsio

guard = sponsio.init(
    framework="langgraph",
    agent_id="bot",
    contracts=[
        "tool `check_policy` must precede `issue_refund`",
        "tool `issue_refund` at most 3 times",
        "response must not contain PII",
    ],
)
agent = create_react_agent(model, guard.wrap(tools))
```

## Shadow mode (zero-risk onboarding)

```python
guard = sponsio.init(framework="langgraph", mode="observe", contracts=[...])
# Every contract is still evaluated ‚Äî nothing is blocked.
# Every would-have-blocked decision is logged to
# ~/.sponsio/sessions/<agent_id>/*.jsonl
# The SPONSIO_MODE env var overrides the kwarg for staged rollouts.
```

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md) ‚Äî install, configure, integrate
- [Contract DSL](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/contracts.md) ‚Äî natural-language syntax, YAML schema, assume/enforce pairs
- [Input Formats](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/input-formats.md) ‚Äî every way to express a contract
- [Integrations](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/integrations.md) ‚Äî per-framework guide (LangGraph, MCP, OpenAI, CrewAI, Agents SDK, Vercel AI, Claude Agent)
- [CLI Reference](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/cli.md) ‚Äî `scan`, `validate`, `check`, `serve`, `demo`, `patterns`, `report`

## Concepts

- **Contract** ‚Äî one `(assumption, enforcement)` pair. Multiple rules per agent = multiple contracts. Each contract is evaluated independently.
- **Det pipeline** ‚Äî LTL evaluation on grounded trace. Binary verdict. Violations route to `DetBlock` or `EscalateToHuman`. No LLM.
- **Sto pipeline** ‚Äî LLM-as-judge on response content. Graded verdict (0‚Äì1). Violations route to `RetryWithConstraint` or `RedirectToSafe`.
- **Pattern library** ‚Äî 29 deterministic patterns (`must_precede`, `rate_limit`, `arg_blacklist`, `scope_limit`, ‚Ä¶) + 7 stochastic (PII, tone, format, length, relevance, content_prohibition, relevance).

## Optional

- [Architecture](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/architecture.md) ‚Äî formula engine, grounding, dual pipeline, span tree observability
- [Benchmark Results](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/docs/benchmark-results.md) ‚Äî ODCV-Bench (80% protection), RedCode-Exec (80% bash / 52% python), tau2-bench (76‚Äì100% recall)
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) ‚Äî every version

Apache 2.0. Zero core dependencies. <https://github.com/SponsioLabs/Sponsio>
